description: Crispy-outside, molten-inside octopus balls from Osaka's vibrant street food scene.
teaser: They spin them with chopsticks on a griddle of half-spheres. The outside is crisp. The inside is lava. Osaka invented this.

steps.slap_context: mixing takoyaki batter with dashi stock

steps.instruction: Cook the takoyaki on the griddle
steps.slap_context: spinning takoyaki on the cast iron griddle

tripo_prompt: Osaka takoyaki octopus balls on a wooden boat plate with takoyaki sauce, mayo, bonito flakes, and green aonori, Japanese street food, top-down view, white background
seedance_prompt: Japanese street vendor spinning takoyaki on a cast iron griddle with chopsticks, steam rising, Osaka neon lights background, cinematic food documentary style
guide_personality: energetic, Osaka humor, streetwise and playful
